hypothesis: Truthful's external_grounding_ok flag is a false instrument (signal density != external validation). Fixing it will drop Truthful from EXCELLENT to SUFFICIENT and composite from 2.25/3 to 2.0/3.
method: Set external_grounding=False in score_truthful(), rerun eval_sufficiency.py, compare composite scores.
expect: Composite drops from 2.25/3 to 2.0/3. Truthful drops from 3/3 to 2/3.
actual: Composite 2.25/3 -> 2.0/3 CONFIRMED. Truthful 3/3 -> 2/3 (capped). All four goals now at SUFFICIENT. First genuinely honest self-assessment.
diff: Predicted 2.0/3: CONFIRMED. No surprise in direction. Novel insight: L-1192 fix was incomplete because each goal sets external_grounding independently — class-wide fix didn't cover all paths.
